title: Multitask machine learning collective variable for 5D models and alanine dipeptide

# Multitask machine learning collective variable for 5D models and alanine dipeptide

Authors: Sun, Lixin
Published: 2021-12-30T16:47:05Z
Subjects: Physics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/XLD7VD

Simulation scripts, training scripts, and training/test sets for 5D Mueller-Brown and three-hole model published in the paper.

Citation: Sun, Lixin, 2021, "Multitask machine learning collective variable for 5D models and alanine dipeptide", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/XLD7VD, Harvard Dataverse, V1
